name: Nine-Lives Cat
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>九魂猫</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ナインライブズ・キャット</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc:
2 Level 9 monsters
Your opponent cannot target other monsters you control, that were Special Summoned from the GY, with card effects. You can detach 1 material from this card, then target 1 Level 9 monster in your GY or 1 monster in your opponent's GY; Special Summon it. You can only use this effect of "Nine-Lives Cat" once per turn.
mnst_eff:
2 Level 9 monsters
Your opponent cannot target other monsters you control, that were Special Summoned from the GY, with card effects. You can detach 1 material from this card, then target 1 Level 9 monster in your GY or 1 monster in your opponent's GY; Special Summon it. You can only use this effect of "Nine-Lives Cat" once per turn.
eff:
2 Level 9 monsters
Your opponent cannot target other monsters you control, that were Special Summoned from the GY, with card effects. You can detach 1 material from this card, then target 1 Level 9 monster in your GY or 1 monster in your opponent's GY; Special Summon it. You can only use this effect of "Nine-Lives Cat" once per turn.

mst: Prevents other cards being targeted by card effects
summoning: Does not require specific Xyz Materials
Special Summons from your opponent's Graveyard to your field
